payload.query: Adequately measuring concepts can be a challenge but is essential for research design. Choose two scholarly works from the comparative politics literature that deal with the same concept but take different approaches to conceptualization and measurement. Discuss the merits of each approach, potential pitfalls, and how the two conceptualizations and measures compare to each other. Is one approach superior to the other? Is there any potential downside to each author developing their own preferred conceptualization/measurement?

articles.title: Sandra Day O’Connor, First Woman on the Supreme Court, Is Dead at 93
articles.abstract: During a crucial period in American law — when abortion, affirmative action, sex discrimination and voting rights were on the docket — she was the most powerful woman in the country.
